text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a year since we shifted Hishi Akebono's
training to focus mainly on bulking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, her muscles are strong enough for her to
take full advantage of her towering frame.
choice_data_list: I think it's time we entered a bigger race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt she'll be able to unleash her full
potential on the racecourse now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really? Yay! Which race should I run in, then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be an easy challenge for her, but we
should strike while the iron is hot and take on a
G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's a sprint that happens on a pretty big
stage, isn't it? Biko told me she's going to run in
that one.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to participate in it! Ooh, this is so
exciting! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, a few days after our gears are set into
motion for the Sprinters S...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me! I'm sorry to bother you right after
you finished training, but I was just so impressed
with your running!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: You're Hishi Akebono, correct?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A reporter writing a piece on Tracen Academy
approaches Hishi Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Interesting! So as a sprinter from the upper
echelons of racing, you're finally making your
move!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I sure am! "Echelons" sure sounds cool.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Is it safe to assume you'll be facing Biko Pegasus
during this great surge forward of hers?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, good question. I'd be really nice if I get to
race against her a lot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her responses cause the reporter to pause in
surprise for a second.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Well, it sounds like the battlefront for sprinters is
about to become much more interesting!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Um, may I have your permission to quote what
you just said in my article?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Go right ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The online article goes live the next day and does
so well that reporters line up to interview Hishi
Akebono for several days on end afterward.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's decision to join the Sprinters S.
has been garnering a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Considering her height, speed, and sheer power
on the track, many may find it surprising who she
views as her rival!

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
And that is none other than Biko Pegasus, a
petite fireball who runs with razor precision and
has an incredible turn of foot!

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
In fact, there's a full thirty-six centimeters of
height difference between them! This is sure to be
an exciting race!

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. A matchup between two athletes with
such a drastic height disparity almost never
happens in other sports.

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
That's what makes the Twinkle Series so much fun
to watch. I'm really looking forward to this one
too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, this is pretty significant, huh? I definitely
can't slack off now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But right after that, the conversation takes a
sudden turn.

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
I have to say, given that one of them is so tall and
the other so short, it'll be quite amusing to see
them standing side-by-side.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
That's true. I think it'll be very visually striking
and rather endearing to see this mismatched pair
together!

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
I agree. I just have a feeling they'll be a hit with
the kids, if you know what I mean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The internet explodes with comments after that
broadcast, and suddenly, everyone is talking
about the two racers' height difference.

text_block_list.name: Social Media
text_block_list.text:
It does make for a funny picture.
Can you even call that a legit race between
them? Ijbol
I think I'll go just to take pictures of them. Lol
choice_data_list:
(They're treating her like some circus
sideshow...)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's wrong, Trainer? You look really
upset about something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was trying not to show my concern, but it seems
my poker face needs work.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you hungry, maybe? I can whip up some
buono snacks if you want!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
There are some carrots in the fridge, so I can
make you carrot chips!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I dodge her question, she'll only worry even
more, so I give it to her straight and tell her
what's worrying me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So people think it'll be funny seeing me and Biko
race because I'm so big and she's so small?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever they might look like outwardly, at their
core, they're both athletes who are taking their
races seriously and chasing their dreams.
choice_data_list:
I want people to take you and your races
seriously.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aww. I'm happy you feel that way, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But, you know, I think I'm lucky that fans want to
come watch me at all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they're only coming because they think my
race with Biko sounds interesting and funny...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But it'd be really great if they learned to love
racing for real after seeing us run!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's not just anyone running either—it's me and
Biko, so I'm sure everyone'll come out of it feeling
full and satisfied!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono sounds so sure of herself. She has
her sights set firmly forward, and her eyes don't
even have a shadow of doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's this resolute, then as her trainer, I should
be even more so.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why? What's wrong?
choice_data_list: Let's show everyone a race they'll never forget!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do our best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Hishi Akebono and Biko
Pegasus are pair running.

text_block_list.name: Bono and Biko
text_block_list.text: Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I lost at the very end... You've gotten even faster, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the only one! I was barely able to
overtake you, since you were going so fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After that particularly lively training session...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: What?! Did you say Carrot Ranger?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out that Biko Pegasus's favorite hero is
doing a show at the shopping district, so all of us
rush to see him.

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming today! I hope you'll keep
cheering me on, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Um... Excuse me! Carrot Ranger? I wanna become
a hero just like you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I'm pouring my heart and soul into
racing... When things aren't going well for me, I
remember what it means to be a hero...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
And that always fills me up with energy and
motivation again!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
What I mean is... I hope that you'll never give up
the fight!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Thank you! I'll never forget your kind
words!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Carrot Ranger was so cool! Right, Biko?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Biko?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Um, I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus looks up at Hishi Akebono with a
renewed fire in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Listen, Bono. I really, really want to do well in racing!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You know what my dream is, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course. You've told me about it every day
since we got into Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You dream of filling everyone with courage like a
hero does through your races, right?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Except... I haven't even won a single
G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm so happy that I can run alongside
you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger became strong thanks to her rival.
And in the same way, I feel like I can work even
harder as long as you're with me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Biko...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It's the same for me too! I feel so strong
and capable when I race with you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how close you always are to overtaking
me really pushes me to my limits because I don't
want you to pass me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm going to get even stronger in
preparation for the Sprinters S.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'll make it so I'll win for sure there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Hishi Akebono and Biko Pegasus
have become motivating catalysts for each
other's growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They bicker every time they see each other and
are always silently trying to catch up with the
other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their bond isn't easy to see, but they're both
pushing each other to greater heights in their own
ways.
choice_data_list: You two are great rivals for each other.
You two are great rivals for each other.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Rivals, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haha! Yeah, you're right! Biko and I are rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them set to work, preparing for their
clash at the Sprinters S.
